---
title: "Watershed Flow Forecasting"
description: "Predicting seasonal streamflow across the Cascades to support water management and flood planning."
image: images/photo-1534260574464-1974fc1e6727.jpg
categories: [Machine Learning, Time Series, Forecasting]
---

## Overview

Placeholder content. A forecasting model blends snowpack, precipitation, and
historical gauge data to project streamflow weeks ahead, with uncertainty bands
that planners can actually act on.

Photo by [Cristofer Maximilian](https://unsplash.com/@cristofer) on [Unsplash](https://unsplash.com/photos/V1YPvfNzvtw).
